entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A remunerative crop grown in rice fallow lands in winter in Nepal

entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A technology used for chickpea production to improve yields and reduce poverty

entities.name: NEPAL
entities.description: The country where the IPM of chickpea project is implemented

entities.name: SOCIO ECONOMIC EMANCIPATION
entities.description: A factor contributing to the success of IPM technology adoption among peasants

entities.name: MARKET LINKAGE
entities.description: A factor that strengthened farmers' faith in IPM technologies

entities.name: RICE FALLOW LANDS
entities.description: The specific land type where chickpea is grown as a winter crop

entities.name: WINTER SEASON
entities.description: The season (rabi) during which chickpea is grown in rice fallow lands

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: A condition that would accelerate the spread of the IPM intervention

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A socio-economic state that is being reduced through the implementation of IPM in chickpea
